'''zakotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecitis|cecitis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecitis|cecitis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zakotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæketheth|zæketheth]] || [[word:zækethej|zækethej]] || [[word:zækethesh|zækethesh]] || [[word:zækethe|zækethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zakokothoth|zakokothoth]] || [[word:zakokothoj|zakokothoj]] || [[word:zakokothosh|zakokothosh]] || [[word:zakokotho|zakokotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zakothoth|zakothoth]] || [[word:zakothoj|zakothoj]] || [[word:zakothosh|zakothosh]] || [[word:zakotho|zakotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zakofthoth|zakofthoth]] || [[word:zakofthoj|zakofthoj]] || [[word:zakofthosh|zakofthosh]] || [[word:zakofthof|zakofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zakothotho|zakothotho]] || [[word:zakothojo|zakothojo]] || [[word:zakothosho|zakothosho]] || [[word:zakothoko|zakothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zakothoth|zakothoth]] || [[word:zakothoj|zakothoj]] || [[word:zakothosh|zakothosh]] || [[word:zakotho|zakotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zakothothol|zakothothol]] || [[word:zakothojol|zakothojol]] || [[word:zakothoshol|zakothoshol]] || [[word:zakothokol|zakothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zakothothotho|zakothothotho]] || [[word:zakothojojo|zakothojojo]] || [[word:zakothoshosho|zakothoshosho]] || [[word:zakothoko|zakothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zakothothon|zakothothon]] || [[word:zakothojon|zakothojon]] || [[word:zakothoshon|zakothoshon]] || [[word:zakothokon|zakothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zakothothoro|zakothothoro]] || [[word:zakothojoro|zakothojoro]] || [[word:zakothoshoro|zakothoshoro]] || [[word:zakothokoro|zakothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
